latin: Vir stultus unguentum novum ostendit et dixit: 'sexaginta centesimis partibus temporis, semper agit.' amici eius confusi eum intuiti sunt.

questions.prompt: What did the foolish man show his friends?

translation: A foolish man showed a new perfume and said: 'Sixty percent of the time, it works every time.' His friends looked at him in confusion.
